mapper.sql: t.id, t.config_key, t.config_name, t.threshold_minutes, t.trigger_strategy, t.enable_flag, t.remark, t.create_time, t.create_by, t.modify_time, t.modify_by, t.row_version, t.row_valid
mapper.select: SELECT FROM vso_config_timeout t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vso_config_timeout t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vso_config_timeout ( config_key, config_name, threshold_minutes, trigger_strategy, enable_flag, remark, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{configKey}, #{configName}, #{thresholdMinutes}, #{triggerStrategy}, #{enableFlag}, #{remark}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )

INSERT INTO vso_config_timeout ( config_key, config_name, threshold_minutes, trigger_strategy, enable_flag, remark, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES
( #{item.configKey}, #{item.configName}, #{item.thresholdMinutes}, #{item.triggerStrategy}, #{item.enableFlag}, #{item.remark}, now(), #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE vso_config_timeout t SET
t.threshold_minutes = #{thresholdMinutes},
t.trigger_strategy = #{triggerStrategy},
t.enable_flag = #{enableFlag},
t.remark = #{remark},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE t.id = #{id}
UPDATE vso_config_timeout t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
